mainEntity.name: Can I sue the heavy machinery manufacturer after a work crush injury in West Valley City?
mainEntity.text: Can I sue the heavy machinery manufacturer after a work crush injury in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if defective machinery like a forklift or crane causes injury, you can pursue a third-party claim against the manufacturer beyond workers' comp, even as an employee.[3][6]

suggestedAnswer.text: Workers' comp covers basic medical and wage benefits, but for machine defects causing crush injuries or amputations, sue the manufacturer separately. This 'third-party liability' claim can yield higher compensation. Evidence of malfunction requires expert analysis. Firms in West Jordan or Sandy can investigate without affecting your comp claim. Beware: employers may pressure you to avoid this.[3][6][7]

name: Suing Machinery Manufacturers for Defects in Utah Work Injuries
